docket_entries.description: SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AIDEEN MURPHY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASPEL LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE HURLEY. PLAINTIFF MM1485BAYS LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AIDEEN MURPHY, AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF ASPEL LP DEFENDANT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY AIDEEN MURPHY, AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2026 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,853.14 FILED BY MM1485BAYS LP ASPEL LP AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ELEANOR FAITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-23-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $140.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ELEANOR FAITH
REMARK: RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON 2/18/26 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF (ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR AIDEEN MURPHY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MM1485BAYS LP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MM1485BAYS LP ASPEL LP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, ELEANOR FAITH DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
